title: Express 5 Resource Design, Middleware Order, Async Errors, and Cancellation · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in layered Express 5 feed-reader API and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Design sources, subscriptions, entries, timelines, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions and method semantics.
Order authority, request identity, limits, authentication, negotiation, validation, authorization, handlers, not-found, and error middleware explicitly.
Use Express 5 Promise rejection flow while preventing double next, double send, partial response, and lost unknown causes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Api Resource Decisions
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 6321 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile resource decisions, middleware order, async errors, request abort, and response finality; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Design sources, subscriptions, entries, timelines, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions and method semantics.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Ts Response Finality
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: feed-ts-response-finality-h1gx2e" that uses case 9928 to reconcile resource decisions, middleware order, async errors, request abort, and response finality.
